Bash('C:/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'library\(data.table\); set.seed\(4459665\); working_data <- data.table\(readRDS\('\\''mkdata/data/01_working.rds'\\''\)\); source\('\\''preamble.R'\\''\); b <- names\(working_data\)[grep\('\\''^B_raw_[0-9]_'\\'', names\(working_data\)\)]; f <- as.formula\(paste0\('\\''~factor\(county\):factor\(quarter_year\) + '\\'', paste0\('\\''factor\(county\):'\\'',b,collapse='\\''+'\\''\),'\\'' + factor\(county\):cust_price - 1'\\''\)\); X <- model.matrix\(f, data=estim_matrix\); cat\('\\''ncol:'\\'', ncol\(X\), '\\'' rank:'\\'', qr\(X\)$rank, '\\''\\n'\\''\); cat\('\\''rowSums B_raw:'\\'', unique\(round\(rowSums\(as.matrix\(estim_matrix[,b]\)\),8\)\),'\\''\\n'\\''\)')

Bash('C:/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'library\(data.table\); working_data <- data.table\(readRDS\('\\''mkdata/data/01_working.rds'\\''\)\); working_data[, total_inside := sum\(salon_share_subdiv\), by=.\(county, quarter_year\)]; working_data[, one_minus_s0 := 1 - outside_share]; cat\('\\''Max abs diff \(sum_shares vs 1-s0\):'\\'', max\(abs\(working_data$total_inside - working_data$one_minus_s0\)\), '\\''\\n'\\''\); cat\('\\''Mean total_inside:'\\'', mean\(working_data$total_inside\), '\\''\\n'\\''\); cat\('\\''Mean 1-s0:'\\'', mean\(working_data$one_minus_s0\), '\\''\\n'\\''\); cat\('\\''Ratio:'\\'', mean\(working_data$total_inside / working_data$one_minus_s0\), '\\''\\n'\\''\); cat\('\\''Min ratio:'\\'', min\(working_data$total_inside / working_data$one_minus_s0\), '\\''\\n'\\''\); cat\('\\''Max ratio:'\\'', max\(working_data$total_inside / working_data$one_minus_s0\), '\\''\\n'\\''\)')

Bash('C:/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'library\(data.table\); working_data <- data.table\(readRDS\('\\''mkdata/data/01_working.rds'\\''\)\); working_data[, ws_wrong := salon_share_subdiv / sum\(salon_share_subdiv\), by=.\(county, quarter_year\)]; working_data[, ws_right := salon_share_subdiv / \(1 - outside_share\)]; cat\('\\''log_within_share \(WRONG - sampled denom\):\\n'\\''\); print\(summary\(log\(working_data$ws_wrong\)\)\); cat\('\\''\\nlog_within_share \(RIGHT - 1-s0 denom\):\\n'\\''\); print\(summary\(log\(working_data$ws_right\)\)\); cat\('\\''\\nDifference in logs:\\n'\\''\); print\(summary\(log\(working_data$ws_right\) - log\(working_data$ws_wrong\)\)\)')

Bash('/c/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'es <- readRDS\("mkdata/data/04_estimation_sample.rds"\); cat\("working_data has hausman_other_price:", "hausman_other_price" %in% names\(es$working_data\), "\\n"\); cat\("estim_matrix has hausman_other_price:", "hausman_other_price" %in% names\(es$estim_matrix\), "\\n"\); cat\("summary:\\n"\); print\(summary\(es$estim_matrix$hausman_other_price\)\); cat\("\\nby county-quarter \(first 9\):\\n"\); dt <- data.table::data.table\(es$working_data\); print\(dt[, .\(hausman = unique\(hausman_other_price\), n = .N\), by = .\(county, quarter_year\)][order\(county, quarter_year\)][1:9]\)')

Bash('/c/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\({library\(data.table\); source\("config.R"\); source\("preamble.R"\)}\); es <- readRDS\("mkdata/data/04_estimation_sample.rds"\); obj <- build_estimation_setup\(es$working_data, es$estim_matrix, config = CONFIG\); cat\("Hausman-IV beta \(price rows\):\\n"\); print\(obj$beta[grep\("cust_price", rownames\(obj$beta\)\), , drop = FALSE]\); cat\("any NA beta:", any\(is.na\(obj$beta\)\), " any NA beta_2:", any\(is.na\(obj$beta_2\)\), "\\n"\); cat\("dim z_mm_1:", dim\(obj$z_mm_1\), " dim mm_1:", dim\(obj$mm_1\), "\\n"\)')

Bash('/c/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\({library\(data.table\); source\("config.R"\)}\); es <- readRDS\("mkdata/data/04_estimation_sample.rds"\); working_data <- es$working_data; estim_matrix <- es$estim_matrix; b_cols <- names\(working_data\)[grep\("^B_raw_[0-9]_", names\(working_data\)\)]; xnam <- c\("factor\(county\):cust_price", "factor\(county\):factor\(quarter_year\)", paste0\("factor\(county\):avg_labor:", b_cols\)\); xnam <- as.formula\(paste0\("~", paste0\(xnam, collapse="+"\), "-1"\)\); mm_1 <- model.matrix\(xnam, data=estim_matrix\); for \(inst in c\("dye_instrument", "hausman_other_price"\)\) { zx <- c\(inst, "factor\(quarter_year\)", paste0\("avg_labor:", b_cols\)\); zxf <- as.formula\(paste0\("~", paste0\(paste0\("factor\(county\):", zx\), collapse="+"\), "-1"\)\); z_mm_1 <- model.matrix\(zxf, data=estim_matrix\); ZtZ_inv <- solve\(t\(z_mm_1\) %*% z_mm_1\); proj_z <- z_mm_1 %*% ZtZ_inv %*% t\(z_mm_1\); beta <- solve\(t\(mm_1\) %*% proj_z %*% mm_1\) %*% \(t\(mm_1\) %*% proj_z %*% as.matrix\(estim_matrix[,"log_rel_mkt"]\)\); cat\(sprintf\("\\n=== Instrument: %s ===\\n", inst\)\); print\(beta[grep\("cust_price", rownames\(beta\)\), , drop=FALSE]\) }')

Bash('/c/Program Files/R/R-4.3.0/bin/Rscript.exe' -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\({library\(data.table\); source\("config.R"\); source\("preamble.R"\)}\); es <- readRDS\("mkdata/data/04_estimation_sample.rds"\); working_data <- es$working_data; estim_matrix <- es$estim_matrix; obj <- build_estimation_setup\(working_data, estim_matrix, config = CONFIG\); beta <- obj$beta; beta_2 <- obj$beta_2; beta_2_subset <- readRDS\("mkdata/data/seeit_bb.rds"\); names\(beta_2_subset\) <- rownames\(beta_2\)[grep\("avg_labor:E_raw_[2-9]{1}\\\\d{0,3}", rownames\(beta_2\)\)]; cfg <- CONFIG; cfg$pl_on <- FALSE; cat\("Running objective_gmm serially...\\n"\); res <- tryCatch\(objective_gmm\(theta = beta_2_subset, x = estim_matrix, beta = beta, beta_2_subset = beta_2_subset, config = cfg, clust = NULL\), error = function\(e\) paste\("ERROR:", conditionMessage\(e\)\)\); if \(is.character\(res\)\) { cat\(res, "\\n"\) } else { cat\("OK, result dim:", dim\(res\), " anyNA:", anyNA\(res\), "\\n"\); print\(colMeans\(res\)\) }')
